roles.organization: Members of Commissions for State Final Examinations at FIT
NES@FIT - Networks and distributed systems research group

education_and_academic_qualification: 2012 - 2014: master's degree at FIT BUT in Brno
2005 - 2009: studied at the Comenius Grammar School in Vyskov

teaching.consulting_hours: Ohlaseni emailem, predmet: [<predmet>] - tema konzultace) Pokud se jedna o konzultace k projektum, ocekavam, ze prijdete s konkretnim netrivialnim problemem k reseni. Ohlaseni predem na email doprovozene o reseny problem a shrnuti Vasi snahy jej samostatne vyresit je standardem. Email notification, subject: [<subject>] - <topic of consultation>) When it comes to project consultations, I expect you to come up with a specific non-trivial problem to solve. Pre-notification to the e-mail accompanied by the solved problem and a summary of your efforts to solve it independently is standard.
